content: CC-CAI sync pilot initialized on ai-cos-cc-adk. sync/ directory created with state.json, inbox.jsonl, project.json. Format validation in progress.
Decided to use append-only JSONL for inbox protocol instead of JSON array. Rationale: simpler concurrent writes, no parse-entire-file overhead, natural time-series ordering.
The Agent SDK ContentAgent migration plan references a 5-phase approach. Is Phase 1 (tool extraction) still the priority, or has the CC-CAI sync work shifted priorities?
Update the source-of-truth docs to reflect the new sync hooks deployment. docs/source-of-truth/system-architecture.md is stale on hook count (says 6, now 8).
